title: Cell Interaction by Multiplet Sequencing (CIM-seq)
author: Nathanael Andrews
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b2byqapw
materials: Primer annealing Thaw plate. Spin down. Incubate in thermocycler at 72 °C for 00:03:00 . Place on ice immediately.
Optional: Carefully remove supernatant to the elution plate
Read in plate reader using 485nM excitation/528nm emission
The dimensionality reduced representation of the data.

steps.title: Prepare Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare Lysis Buffer: NOTE: Reagents are prepared on ice, working quickly. ERCC is stored in single-use aliquots at -80 °C , thawed on ice and added last. %s %s 1H201.31Inhibitor0.05ERCC (1:600000)0.0510% Triton0.0410mM dNTP0.5100uM dT0.05Total2 Add 2 µL lysis buffer mix to each well. Cover with appropriate lids. Spin down. Snap freeze on dry ice . Store until use at -80 °C

steps.title: Sort single cells and multiplets (aggregates...
steps.instruction: Sort single cells and multiplets (aggregates of multiple cells) into 2 µL lysis buffer mix. Multiplets can be discerned from singlets by gating on the basis of FSC-W (Forward scatter - Width) and FSC-H (Forward scatter - Height) (see Figure 1 ). Figure 1. Gating scheme and result of FSC-W and FSC-H based sort of multiplets (top) and singlets (bottom) using HCT116 cells . Following sort, immediately seal with appropriate seals (approved for -80C > 100C) and centrifuge at 2000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . Snap freeze on dry ice . Store until use at -80 °C .

steps.title: Prepare RT master-mix Made fresh
steps.instruction: Prepare RT master-mix Made fresh. %s %s SmartScribe0.475RNase Inhibitor0.1255x First Strand buffer1DTT (100mM)0.25Betaine (5M) [fridge]1MgCl2 (1M) [bench]0.03TSO (100uM)0.05H200.07Total3 Dispense 3 µL per well. Cover plate with new film and spin down.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 42 °C 01:30:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 42 °C 01:30:00 70 °C 00:05:00 4 °C hold

steps.title: cDNA preamplification Made fresh
steps.instruction: cDNA preamplification Made fresh. %s %s 1RT reaction5H2O1.0688Kapa HiFi HotStart ReadyMix (2x)6.25IS_PCR primer (10uM)0.125Lambda Exonuclease0.05625Total7.5000 Dispense 7.5 µL per well . Total reaction volume will be 12.5µl. Spin down. Cover with new lid.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler with the following program
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler with the following program: %s %s StepTemperatureTimeCyclesLambda exonuclease37ºC30 min1xInitial denaturation95ºC3 min1xDenaturation98ºC20 sec18-24xAnnealing67ºC15 secElongation72ºC4 minFinal elongation72ºC5 min1x4CHold

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.7x the reaction volume of SPRI beads per well. Mix well by pipetting. (i.e 8.75 µL SPRI-bead solution for 12.5 µL reaction volume)

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Place on magnetic stand for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic stand for 00:03:00

steps.title: Add 40 µl 80% EtOH and incubate 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl 80% EtOH and incubate 00:00:30

steps.title: Remove EtOH (without disturbing the beads)
steps.instruction: Remove EtOH (without disturbing the beads)

steps.title: Wash again with EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash again with EtOH. Make sure to remove well.

steps.title: Remove plate from magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove plate from magnetic stand

steps.title: Elute beads in 15 µL EB or TE buffer
steps.instruction: Elute beads in 15 µL EB or TE buffer. Mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Place on magnetic plate for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic plate for 00:03:00

steps.title: Add 97 µL of 1X Qubit...
steps.instruction: Add 97 µL of 1X Qubit HS dsDNA solution to a flat-bottom, black plate

steps.title: Add 3 µL of cDNA sample
steps.instruction: Add 3 µL of cDNA sample

steps.title: Add Standards (NOTE
steps.instruction: Add Standards (NOTE: We make a 8-step ladder from 0ng/µl --> 10ng/µl Qubit Standard DNA in TE buffer)

steps.title: Calculate cDNA concentration
steps.instruction: Calculate cDNA concentration

steps.title: (optional) cDNA quality control Using Agilent...
steps.instruction: (optional) cDNA quality control Using Agilent HS 5000 DNA chips (or equivalent) Figure 2. cDNA profile of single cell run on HS D5000 Agilent tapestation

steps.title: Make cDNA dilution plate Dilute cDNA...
steps.instruction: Make cDNA dilution plate Dilute cDNA in water based on average concentration from Qubit measurements. Target concentration 150pg per µl in 15 µL .

steps.title: Tn5 digestion Tn5 is produced from...
steps.instruction: Tn5 digestion Tn5 is produced from psfTn5 (Addgene #79107), purified to ~3mg/ml and assembled with Illumina Tn5 adapters (see oligos) as in Picelli et al, 2014. Tn5 transposase and tagmentation procedures for massively scaled sequencing projects.. Genome research.

steps.title: Prepare Tn5 master mix NOTE
steps.instruction: Prepare Tn5 master mix NOTE: TAPS-PEG Buffer contains PEG, which is viscous. Buffer should equilibrate to room temperature before use to allow proper mixing. %s %s ReagentReaction conc.µl per reactionNuclease free H2O-1.05TAPS-PEG (50mM TAPS, 25mM MgCl2, 40% PEG-8000)10mM TAPS, 5mM MgCl2, 8% PEG-80000.5psfTn5, loaded with 50µM MEDS-A/B0.25Total1.8 Dispense 1.8 µL per well in a new plate(tagmentation plate)

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.7 µL cDNA (normalized to 150pg/µl) Mix well by vortexing plate. Cover with new lid and spin down.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler at 55 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler at 55 °C 00:10:00 Remove immediately and stop reaction by adding 1 µL per well of 0.1% SDS. Vortex, spin down and incubate 00:07:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Make PCR master-mix %s %s 1H2O13
steps.instruction: Make PCR master-mix %s %s 1H2O13.255x buffer5dNTPs0.75KAPA0.5Dispense19.50 Dispense 19.5 µL per well to tagmentation plate (containing 3.5 µL sample after step 14)

steps.title: Add primers/barcodes 2 µL per well...
steps.instruction: Add primers/barcodes 2 µL per well (from 384-well index plates, with 3.75µM/each forward/reverse primers; see oligos in materials ). Total reaction volume is 25 µL ( 3.5 µL sample + 19.5 µL PCR mix and 2 µL primers).

steps.title: Vortex
steps.instruction: Vortex. Spin down and cover. Incubate in thermocycler as following: %s %s StepTemperatureTimeCyclesGap fill72ºC3 min1xFirst denature95ºC30 sec1xDenature95ºC15 sec12xDenature67ºC30 secDenature72ºC45 secFinal extension72ºC4 min1x4-10ºChold

steps.title: Pool 2
steps.instruction: Pool 2.5 µL from each well to an 1.5ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.9x pooled library volume of SPRI-bead solution. Incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Remove supernatant without disturbing magnetic beads
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant without disturbing magnetic beads.

steps.title: Add at least 1 mL 80% EtOH (fresh)
steps.instruction: Add at least 1 mL 80% EtOH (fresh). Incubate for 00:00:30 ..

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat EtOH wash
steps.instruction: Repeat EtOH wash.

steps.title: Re-suspend beads thoroughly in 100 µl EB or TE buffer
steps.instruction: Re-suspend beads thoroughly in 100 µl EB or TE buffer.

steps.title: Place eppendorf on magnetic rack for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place eppendorf on magnetic rack for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new 1.5ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Repeat cleanup (from step 1-
steps.instruction: Repeat cleanup (from step 1-

steps.title: and elute in 30 µl EB or TE buffer
steps.instruction: and elute in 30 µl EB or TE buffer. 12.(Optional) Place eppendorf on magnetic rack for 00:03:00 and transfer supernatant to new tube.

steps.title: Pooled library QC Figure 3
steps.instruction: Pooled library QC Figure 3. cDNA profile of a library of 784 cells (both single cells and multiplets) on HS D5000 Agilent tapestation.

steps.title: Trim reads, remove adapter sequences and...
steps.instruction: Trim reads, remove adapter sequences and align RNAseq data to reference genome using STAR: STAR: ultrafast universal RNA-seq aligner.. Bioinformatics (Oxford, England).

steps.title: Remove duplicate reads using Picard
steps.instruction: Remove duplicate reads using Picard: The Genome Analysis Toolkit: a MapReduce framework for analyzing next-generation DNA sequencing data.. Genome research.

steps.title: Generate transcript counts file using HTSeq
steps.instruction: Generate transcript counts file using HTSeq: HTSeq--a Python framework to work with high-throughput sequencing data.. Bioinformatics (Oxford, England).

steps.title: The raw counts data with gene...
steps.instruction: The raw counts data with gene IDs as rownames and sample IDs as colnames.

steps.title: The ERCC spike-in counts data with...
steps.instruction: The ERCC spike-in counts data with gene IDs as rownames and sample IDs as colnames.

steps.title: A class for each of the individual singlets
steps.instruction: A class for each of the individual singlets. In order to generate the last two of these we recommend using the Seurat package in R, as CIM-seq is implemented in R as well. A number of tutorials for Seurat can be found on the Satijalab website: https://satijalab.org/seurat/vignettes.html

steps.title: CIM-seq can be downloaded from
steps.instruction: CIM-seq can be downloaded from: https://github.com/EngeLab/CIMseq Or installed directly in R using the devtools package: devtools::install_github("EngeLab/CIMseq") The CIM-seq vignette can be found at: https://github.com/EngeLab/CIMseq/tree/master/vignettes

steps.title: CIM-seq is compatible with both plate...
steps.instruction: CIM-seq is compatible with both plate based and droplet based single cell RNA-seq methods. The following protocol is for Smart-seq2 based CIM-seq. For droplet based (10x), see the methods section of the manuscript and the vignettes in the Enge lab Github repository .
